description: A legal note - the writer agree to pay to pay the mortgage for 'Old Egypt' without delay. In the opening lines Shaykh Muḥ[ammad] al-Ḥamawī is referenced. The note is signed by David Abu al-___r[?]. AA. MCD.
tags: FGP stub, early modern, Late Heb
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
